content_body: We had a family vacation for the first time in five years and it was awesome. The fishing was great, the views were wonderful, and the time with our three sons was perfect. The pool table and board games were a family focus in the evenings. We had such a great time and I even managed to finish a paper because the Internet connection was great. We broke up cooking so each of us cooked one awesome meal each night. We were impressed with how cook-friendly the kitchen was. We are hoping to make the trip again next year! Thank you! We really needed the vacation and will recommend to our friends. ~ The Edlemans
title: Our First Family Vacation In Five Years
